startingPoints.name: Brand
startingPoints.subtitle: Logo lockup + mono eyebrow subtitle, used in the top bar

startingPoints.name: Button
startingPoints.subtitle: Bordered button — default and primary (rust) variants

startingPoints.name: Chip
startingPoints.subtitle: Filter chip with a color dot — toggles active/inactive

startingPoints.name: MapPin
startingPoints.subtitle: Map marker dot — type color fill, verified/unverified ring, dashed if seasonal, star ring if sponsored

startingPoints.name: Modal
startingPoints.subtitle: Backdrop dialog — used for the single 'Suggest a stop' flow

startingPoints.name: Panel
startingPoints.subtitle: Bordered floating box — hosts the filter list and the legend

startingPoints.name: PopupCard
startingPoints.subtitle: Map-pin popup — stop name, photo, meta, notes, actions

cards.subtitle: Intentional addition — base dog-face avatars are earned upgrades, not a free pick: locked → collar → crown as contributors level up
cards.name: Avatar Set

cards.subtitle: Intentional addition — first stop, streak, explorer, and star-milestone badges to pair with the avatar leveling system
cards.name: Milestone Badge Icons

cards.subtitle: Intentional addition — no pins in view, GPS permission denied, offline
cards.name: Map Empty / Loading States

cards.subtitle: Intentional addition — directions, verified, and unverified action icons
cards.name: Icon Set — Actions

cards.subtitle: Intentional addition — near me, toy, and report-a-problem icons
cards.name: Icon Set — Utility

cards.subtitle: Intentional addition — hand-drawn-weight line icons in the absence of a source icon system (see README Iconography)
cards.name: Icon Set

cards.subtitle: Dog-face mark, matching the avatar illustration style, plus favicon and single-color variant
cards.name: Logo Lockup

cards.subtitle: OSM tiles desaturated + sepia-tinted so the map reads as 'aged paper', not a stock map
cards.name: Map Background Treatment

cards.subtitle: Intentional addition — dusk tile treatment for evening/night walks, same filter-based logic as the base map
cards.name: Night-Walk Map Filter

cards.subtitle: Intentional addition — winter vs. summer tile treatments, same 'aged paper' logic as the base filter
cards.name: Seasonal Map Filter

cards.subtitle: Signature depth cue: flat-color offset shadows, zero blur, like a stamped card catching light
cards.name: Shadows — Hard Offset

cards.subtitle: Intentional addition — share, copy-link, email, message, and platform glyphs for a future 'share this stop' action
cards.name: Social Sharing Icons

cards.subtitle: Intentional addition — sample weekly digest email copy, in the brand's voice
cards.name: Email Digest Copy

cards.subtitle: Paper, ink, and the three accent colors
cards.name: Core Palette

cards.subtitle: Verified / unverified — the only two states that matter on the map
cards.name: Status Colors

cards.subtitle: Marker colors for each stop type — used for dots, chips, pins
cards.name: Stop-Type Colors

cards.subtitle: Default and primary variants, with icon
cards.name: Button

cards.subtitle: Filter chips (active/inactive) and status badges
cards.name: Chip & Badge

cards.subtitle: Filter/legend container, and the map marker dot in each state
cards.name: Panel & MapPin

cards.subtitle: Map-pin popup, suggest-a-stop dialog, and the topbar lockup
cards.name: PopupCard, Modal & Brand

cards.subtitle: Success / error / info confirmation toast
cards.name: Toast

cards.subtitle: Full click-through recreation: filters, legend, popups, suggest-a-stop modal
cards.name: Dog Treat Trail Map

cards.subtitle: Intentional addition — onboarding shown inside an iOS device bezel
cards.name: Mobile Frame

cards.subtitle: Intentional addition — admin view of pending submissions, matching the source repo's approval.gs/verify.gs Sheet workflow
cards.name: Moderation Queue

cards.subtitle: Intentional addition — themed sub-lists grouping stops by neighborhood
cards.name: Neighborhood Collections

cards.subtitle: Intentional addition — 3-screen swipeable intro before first map view
cards.name: Onboarding

cards.subtitle: Intentional addition — contributor profile with avatar level progress, badges earned, and a community leaderboard
cards.name: Profile & Leaderboard

cards.subtitle: Intentional addition — 'Suggest a walk' finds a treat-dense start/end route; 'Explore' surfaces unverified/sparse stops needing a visit
cards.name: Suggested Walks & Explore Mode

cards.subtitle: Intentional addition — shareable full-page view of one stop, for linking from social/email
cards.name: Stop Detail Page

cards.subtitle: Intentional addition — printable route card for a local pet shop bulletin board
cards.name: Printable Trail Flier

cards.subtitle: Small, consistent radii — 2–5px. Never pill-shaped or fully rounded; this is a paper-craft/stamped-sign brand, not a soft one
cards.name: Corner Radii

cards.subtitle: 4–24px scale — tight, compact UI chrome (no generous 32/48px gaps)
cards.name: Spacing Scale

cards.subtitle: Sans body — buttons, chip labels, popup notes, form copy
cards.name: Body / Inter

cards.subtitle: Serif display — stop names, headings, wordmark. Warm, editorial, never for body copy or UI chrome
cards.name: Display / Fraunces

cards.subtitle: Eyebrow labels, meta, badges, legend — the 'field notebook' voice, always uppercase + tracked
cards.name: Mono / JetBrains Mono
